title: Tenant-Settings Migration — master_record_tenant → vector_artefacts (+ workspace-vocabulary rename)
status_note: Substantially complete on handler/route side as of 2026-05-14. Service moved to backend/internal/tenantmasterrecord (no longer a `tenantsettings` package); route renamed /tenant-settings → /workspace-settings and mounted under /_site (main.go ~L1136). Reads from vaPool. ETL state of master_record_tenant rows mmff_vector → vector_artefacts is unverified — needs row-count check. Frontend caller migration + openapi paperwork pending project-wide. 2026-05-15: appended 4 new stories (00564–00567) to align vocabulary with the workspace tier per MY_HANDOVER.md cleanup register Story 1. Table renamed master_record_tenants → master_record_workspaces in vector_artefacts; Go package renamed tenantmasterrecord → workspacemasterrecord; frontend API helper renamed; dev ETL script renamed.
scope:
Migrate the /tenant-settings API endpoint from master_record_tenant in mmff_vector to a new master_record_tenant table in vector_artefacts. The existing table stores subscription-scoped org configuration (name, brand colours, timezone, etc.). The new table uses workspace_id as the tenancy key (consistent with the rest of vector_artefacts). A one-time ETL step copies live data. The handler service is rewritten to query vaPool. The route is registered under /samantha/v2; the v1 registration is removed. This unblocks PLA-0030 T4b, completing Task 4.

2026-05-15 extension: after the table landed in vector_artefacts keyed by workspace_id, the table name itself (master_record_tenants) and its tenant_* column prefixes no longer match the workspace-tier mental model locked in by R028 §8 Decision A.2. Stories 00564–00567 rename the table → master_record_workspaces, rename the Go package tenantmasterrecord → workspacemasterrecord, rename the frontend API helper, and rename the dev ETL script. Same row, same FK relationship, new vocabulary.
value:
Eliminates the last subscription-scoped config table blocking v2 promotion. After this plan, every non-topology non-legacy route will be backed by vector_artefacts, making PLA-0030 Task 10 (v1 block removal) dependent only on topology, defects, user-stories, flows, and portfolio-items migrations.

2026-05-15: vocabulary that matches the architecture cuts ongoing reasoning cost. Today every reader has to translate "tenant" ↔ "workspace" before reasoning about this table; renaming makes the table self-documenting. It also unblocks MY_HANDOVER.md cleanup register Story 2, which introduces a real tenant-defaults table (London HQ-style global defaults) that can't safely take the name master_record_tenant until this one releases it.
implementation_plan: Task 1: Inspect master_record_tenant schema in mmff_vector — list all columns; map subscription_id → workspace_id tenancy translation; identify any columns not present in PLA-0024 schema changes.
Task 2: Create artefacts_schema migration — new master_record_tenant table in vector_artefacts scoped by workspace_id (mirroring the existing column set but dropping subscription_id).
Task 3: ETL — one-off script to copy master_record_tenant rows from mmff_vector to vector_artefacts, resolving subscription_id → workspace_id via the workspaces table.
Task 4: Rewrite tenantsettings.Service to query vaPool; tenancy gate uses mmff_vector pool for membership check only.
Task 5: Register /tenant-settings under /samantha/v2 in main.go; remove /samantha/v1 registration.
Task 6: Switch frontend callers to apiInfra or apiV2 as appropriate (tenant-settings may qualify as infra — decide during implementation).
Task 7: Update openapi-v2.yaml + openapi.yaml; update c_c_v1_v2_cutover.md and PLA-0030 T4 → done.

Task 8 (2026-05-15): vector_artefacts migration 067 — rename table master_record_tenants → master_record_workspaces. Rename all 17 columns from master_record_tenants_* → master_record_workspaces_*. Rename 3 indexes, 7 check constraints, and the trigger function. Mirror migration 063's transactional shape.

Task 9 (2026-05-15): rename Go package backend/internal/tenantmasterrecord → workspacemasterrecord (3 files: handler.go, service.go, sql.go). Update sole-writer SQL strings to reference master_record_workspaces. Update callers: backend/cmd/server/main.go (service construction + route registration), backend/internal/portfoliomodels/dev_reset.go, backend/internal/portfoliomodels/sql.go. Update test: backend/internal/portfoliomodels/master_reset_crossdb_test.go.

Task 10 (2026-05-15): rename app/lib/tenantSettingsApi.ts → app/lib/workspaceSettingsApi.ts. Rename exported types TenantSettings* → WorkspaceSettings*. Update import paths in: app/(user)/vector-admin/tenant-details/page.tsx, app/(user)/workspace-settings/workspace-settings/organisation/page.tsx, app/components/UnsavedChangesBar.tsx, app/lib/apiSite/index.ts.

Task 11 (2026-05-15): rename dev/scripts/etl_tenant_settings.sql → dev/scripts/etl_workspace_settings.sql. Update SELECT/INSERT statements to reference master_record_workspaces and master_record_workspaces_* columns. Smoke-test against dev DB.
areas_impacted: Backend: backend/cmd/server/main.go — v2 registration, v1 deregistration
Database: new artefacts_schema migration for master_record_tenant in vector_artefacts
Frontend: api('/tenant-settings') callers → apiV2 or apiInfra
SQL (2026-05-15): db/vector_artefacts/schema/067_*.sql — table + column + index + constraint + trigger renames
API (2026-05-15): backend/internal/tenantmasterrecord/ directory rename to workspacemasterrecord/ + 3 caller updates + 1 test update
UI (2026-05-15): app/lib/tenantSettingsApi.ts rename + 4 consumer file updates
Docs (2026-05-15): MY_HANDOVER.md cleanup register Story 1 marked done
features_extended: Vocabulary alignment (2026-05-15): table renamed master_record_tenants → master_record_workspaces in vector_artefacts; all 17 columns re-prefixed.
Go package rename (2026-05-15): backend/internal/tenantmasterrecord → workspacemasterrecord, sole-writer of the renamed table.
Frontend API helper rename (2026-05-15): app/lib/tenantSettingsApi.ts → app/lib/workspaceSettingsApi.ts with type renames.

work_item_backlog.title: Go: rename internal/tenantmasterrecord → workspacemasterrecord + update callers
work_item_backlog.note: FE-API-0027, EST F3, RISK MED. Split 2026-05-15 into 00565a (SQL string updates, shipped atomically with 00564 to avoid leaving the backend broken across the table rename) and 00565b (directory + package rename + caller updates + test, deferred for review). See orders 9a and 9b.

work_item_backlog.title: Go (sub-story of 00565): update SQL strings in tenantmasterrecord to reference master_record_workspaces
work_item_backlog.note: FE-API-0027, EST F1, RISK LOW. Shipped 2026-05-15 atomically with 00564. Updated 6 files: backend/internal/tenantmasterrecord/{sql.go,service.go,handler.go}, backend/internal/portfoliomodels/{sql.go,dev_reset.go,master_reset_crossdb_test.go}, backend/cmd/server/main.go. Two refs in dev_reset.go (lines 64, 218) intentionally retain master_record_tenants — those describe the mmff_vector vestigial table which is a different table. go build ./... clean.

work_item_backlog.title: Go (sub-story of 00565): rename directory tenantmasterrecord → workspacemasterrecord + update 3 callers + 1 test
work_item_backlog.note: FE-API-0027, EST F2, RISK MED. Shipped 2026-05-15 (supervised). git mv preserved history; package declarations updated in handler/service/sql; main.go import + service constructor calls + 5 local variable names (tenantSettingsPool/Svc/H → workspaceSettings*) updated. Surface ended up smaller than scoped: portfoliomodels/dev_reset.go + sql.go + master_reset_crossdb_test.go do NOT import the package directly — they only reference table names in SQL strings, which were covered by 00565a. go build clean. Backend restarted; all 5 smoke checks (boot/env/GET/PATCH/trigger) pass on the renamed package.

work_item_backlog.title: Frontend: rename tenantSettingsApi.ts → workspaceSettingsApi.ts + update consumers
work_item_backlog.note: FE-UI-0016, EST F2, RISK LOW. Shipped 2026-05-15. File renamed + 3 consumer files updated (TenantContext.tsx, vector-admin/tenant-details/page.tsx, workspace-settings/.../organisation/page.tsx). Type names Tenant* → Workspace*. JSON property keys retain tenant_* prefix because the Go wire shape still emits those — kept honest to the wire; full key rename is a follow-up after Go JSON tags change. tsc clean on the 4 affected files. TenantContext.tsx filename intentionally NOT renamed in this scope (would cascade into every importer).

work_item_backlog.title: Dev: rename etl_tenant_settings.sql → etl_workspace_settings.sql + adjust content
work_item_backlog.note: FE-DEV-0026, EST F1, RISK LOW. Shipped 2026-05-15: file renamed via git mv (preserves history), header updated to reflect new target table. Body NOT updated because it was already stale before today's work — it uses migration-036 column names (workspace_id, tenant_name, etc.) which were renamed to master_record_tenants_* by migration 063 last week. Fixing the body is covered by PLA-0032 work-item order 3 (unverified ETL), out of scope for vocabulary rename.

risks.risk: PLA-0024 may alter master_record_tenant schema (rename/restructure) — timing dependency if PLA-0024 and PLA-0032 run concurrently
risks.mitigation: Coordinate with PLA-0024; complete PLA-0024's tenant-settings changes before running the ETL migration in Task 3

risks.risk: subscription_id → workspace_id mapping may be ambiguous for multi-workspace subscriptions
risks.mitigation: ETL audit during Task 1 confirms cardinality; one-workspace-per-subscription assumption documented or multi-workspace case handled explicitly

risks.risk: Renamed table master_record_workspaces in vector_artefacts collides by name with master_record_workspaces in mmff_vector (different DBs, different purposes — anchor identity vs settings sidecar)
risks.mitigation: Document the dual-table pattern in docs/c_c_db_routing.md; lint:no-db-in-handlers + pool routing prevents cross-DB writes; sole-writer service (workspacemasterrecord) keeps the vector_artefacts table isolated

risks.risk: Story 00565 (Go rename) touches main.go service wiring — typo or wrong pool risks broken handler at boot
risks.mitigation: Smoke-test /_site/workspace-settings against dev DB before merge; CI go build ./... gate

references.label: R028 — portfolio hierarchy & scoping synthesis (decision A.2 locks workspace as top scope tier)
